summary: Started M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001 after M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001 CLOSED and entered origin/main. This task adds lightweight, dismissible, localized player guidance for the M7 core UI path without creating a full tutorial system or changing simulation authority.

tests_run.result: Clean main synchronized with origin/main before task branch creation.
Ready tasks were M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001 and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001; selected player guidance as the highest-priority UI/localization follow-up.

decisions.decision: Start M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001 after map presentation closure because the accepted UI/localization plan orders core surfaces before guidance/regression exit work.
Writer should reuse accepted M7 tutorial/hints/encyclopedia/guidance read-model assets and productize a lightweight core path rather than create a full new tutorial system.
No Human Gate is active; manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.

risks.summary: Lightweight guidance can drift into a full tutorial or new rules system.
risks.mitigation: Task acceptance restricts work to existing read models, command previews, localized text, and dismissible UI.

risks.summary: Unreviewed culture-specific wording or symbols could be introduced by player guidance copy.
risks.mitigation: Use accepted review-state wording and route unresolved culture-specific content rather than deciding locally.

requested_action: Client engineer should implement within allowed paths, write writer REVIEW handoff, and route to qa_reviewer. Do not open PR, merge, or mark CLOSED.
